scripts.generate-grpc: mkdir -p generated && grpc_tools_node_protoc --plugin=protoc-gen-ts=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-ts --ts_out=generated --grpc_out=generated --js_out=import_style=commonjs,binary:generated --import_style=commonjs -I ../proto ../proto/ddd/v1/*.proto && echo 'JS gRPC stubs generated'
